name: Save Artifact
description: Save a file to this agent's artifacts directory. Use this after completing analysis, generating reports, creating images, building PDFs, or producing any output file. Files are stored under shared/agents/<agent-id>/artifacts/ and are accessible via the web UI.

function.name: save_artifact
function.description: Save a file to this agent's artifacts directory. Use this after completing analysis, generating reports, creating images, building PDFs, or producing any output file. Files are stored under shared/agents/<agent-id>/artifacts/ and are accessible via the web UI.

filename.description: The filename for the artifact (e.g. 'report.md', 'analysis.txt', 'output.json'). Must not contain path separators.

content.description: The text content of the artifact file.
